penalties.label: No CI test workflow
penalties.reason: Tests exist but are not clearly enforced in CI.

penalties.label: Oversized files detected
penalties.reason: Large files can hurt repository clarity and delivery quality.

penalties.label: Weak test baseline
penalties.reason: A very small test suite provides limited confidence.

penalties.label: No CI test workflow
penalties.reason: Tests exist but are not clearly enforced in CI.

penalties.label: Virtual environment committed
penalties.reason: A committed local virtual environment is a strong negative delivery signal.

penalties.label: __pycache__ committed
penalties.reason: Python cache folders should not be versioned.

penalties.label: Build artifacts committed
penalties.reason: Generated build or cache artifacts reduce repository cleanliness.

penalties.label: .egg-info committed
penalties.reason: Packaging metadata should usually be excluded from version control.

penalties.label: Oversized files detected
penalties.reason: Large files can hurt repository clarity and delivery quality.

penalties.label: README missing
penalties.reason: A missing README is a major blocker for portfolio and delivery quality.

penalties.label: No tests detected
penalties.reason: The absence of tests weakens reliability and engineering credibility.

penalties.label: Main code directory missing
penalties.reason: A missing dedicated code directory reduces structural clarity.

penalties.label: Root overcrowded
penalties.reason: A crowded repository root suggests weak organization.
